name: GPT-2
brainrotOneliner: 117M parameters. predicted the next token before it was cool. the ancestor that started everything.
keyInnovations: Demonstrated that language models can perform tasks without task-specific fine-tuning
Showed emergent zero-shot capabilities from scale — radical for 2019
Decoder-only architecture (no encoder) became the dominant paradigm
Used learned positional embeddings and layer norm before attention
brainrotSummary: GPT-2 is the foundational NPC. it proved that if you just predict the next token on enough text, capabilities emerge for free. openai was so scared of this thing they initially refused to release it. looking back, adorable. the grandfather of the entire current AI moment.

comparisons.deepseek-v3: GPT-2 is the NPC ancestor. DeepSeek V3 is what happens after 5 years of scaling laws, MoE routing, and a company with something to prove. not even a fair fight.
comparisons.gpt3: GPT-3 is just GPT-2 after a long bulk season. same architecture, 1000x the parameters. the glow-up.
comparisons.llama2: LLaMA 2 took everything GPT-2 established and made it open, efficient, and actually useful. evolution arc.
comparisons.gpt4: GPT-2 vs GPT-4 is like comparing a flip phone to a smartphone. same basic idea, completely different universe.
comparisons.claude3: GPT-2 laid the foundation. Claude 3 is the skyscraper.
comparisons.llama3-instruct: GPT-2 is the NPC origin. LLaMA 3 Instruct is what the meta engineers built standing on its shoulders.
comparisons.mixtral-8x7b: GPT-2 never heard of MoE. Mixtral said why activate everything when you can delegate.
comparisons.grok-1: GPT-2 is the lore. Grok-1 is the chaotic energy that came after years of everyone reading that lore.
